repos.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works
repos.takeaway: Steal the skills-as-shell-composables architecture. Superpowers packages discrete capabilities as invokable shell skills with a clear methodology for skill discovery, chaining, and agentic dev workflows — directly maps to Shikki's plugin/skill system. Study how it handles skill registration and dispatch.

repos.description: Teams-first Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code
repos.takeaway: Multi-agent orchestration patterns for Claude Code teams — steal the agent-to-agent communication protocol, task delegation model, and how it handles parallel agent execution. Directly applicable to Shikki's @agent dispatch pipeline.

repos.description: The agent that grows with you
repos.takeaway: Adaptive memory and learning patterns — steal how Hermes accumulates context over sessions and grows its capability model. Relevant to Shikki's ShikiDB memory layer and how radar/ingest findings should feed back into agent behavior.

repos.description: ChatDev 2.0: Dev All through LLM-powered Multi-Agent Collaboration
repos.takeaway: LLM multi-agent software dev collaboration — steal role specialization (PM, engineer, tester agents) and the structured handoff protocol between agents. Maps to Shikki's @Sensei/@Hanami/@tech-expert review pipeline in /pre-pr.

repos.description: A visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code — from basic concepts to advanced agents
repos.takeaway: Mine for undocumented Claude Code agent patterns and advanced tool-use examples. Particularly useful for improving Shikki's md-feature and quick pipeline prompts, and for identifying Claude Code capabilities Shikki isn't yet exploiting.
Claude Code workflow conventions — audit against Shikki's current CLAUDE.md rules and hook configs for gaps or improvements.

repos.description: The absolute trainer to light up AI agents
repos.takeaway: AI agent optimization/training patterns — steal any eval or benchmarking methodology applicable to measuring Shikki pipeline quality.

repos.description: Vim-fork focused on extensibility and usability
repos.takeaway: Terminal UX and extensibility architecture — Neovim's plugin API and lazy-loading model are reference-grade for Shikki's Swift CLI plugin system design.

repos.description: Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI
Hunt down social media accounts by username across social networks
Self-hosted AI accounting app analyzing receipts and transactions
A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer
